title: HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER - 211info
text: HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides urgent care services for mental health and addiction concerns. Services include assessment for mental health and/or addiction concerns, crisis counseling, information and referral, education on mental health and addiction, peer support, and connection to treatment providers. Concerned loved ones may also receive support and information about available community services. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday 10am-4pm (503) 846-2288 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-2288 Alternate (503) 291-9111 Crisis Line INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP. No cost for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Drop In Centers Mental Health Evaluation Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH REFERRALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER
